ddls:
CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the team is based */,
  "mascot" TEXT /* Team mascot name */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the current head coach */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "arena_name" TEXT /* Name of the home arena */,
  "arena_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the home arena */,
  "primary_color" TEXT /* Primary color of the team */,
  "secondary_color" TEXT /* Secondary color of the team */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "social_media_links" TEXT /* JSON string containing links to the team's social media profiles */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "standings" (
  "standings_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each standings entry */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team associated with the standings */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage */,
  "games_behind" REAL /* Games behind first place */,
  "home_record" TEXT /* Record at home (wins-losses) */,
  "away_record" TEXT /* Record away (wins-losses) */,
  "division_record" TEXT /* Division record (wins-losses) */,
  "conference_record" TEXT /* Conference record (wins-losses) */,
  "points_per_game" REAL /* Average points scored per game */,
  "opponent_points_per_game" REAL /* Average points allowed per game */,
  "point_difference" REAL /* Point differential */,
  "streak" TEXT /* Current winning streak */,
  "last_10_games" TEXT /* Record over the last 10 games */,
  "made_playoffs" INTEGER /* Indicator if the team made the playoffs */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season the standings are for */,
  "division" TEXT /* The division the team is in */,
  "conference" TEXT /* The conference the team is in */,
  "total_points" INTEGER /* Total points scored in the season */,
  "total_opponent_points" INTEGER /* Total points allowed in the season */,
  "home_win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage at home */,
  "away_win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage away */,
  "division_win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage in divisional games */,
  "conference_win_percentage" REAL /* Winning percentage in conference games */,
  "rank" INTEGER /* Current rank in the standings */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("standings_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_standings_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date the game was played */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the game */,
  "playoff_game" INTEGER /* Indicator if the game was a playoff game */,
  "season" TEXT /* The season the game is part of */,
  "overtime" INTEGER /* Indicator if the game went into overtime */,
  "overtime_periods" INTEGER /* Number of overtime periods played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the game */,
  "tv_network" TEXT /* TV network broadcasting the game */,
  "referees" TEXT /* JSON string containing the names of the referees */,
  "home_team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the home team's coach for the game */,
  "away_team_coach" TEXT /* Name of the away team's coach for the game */,
  "home_team_starting_lineup" TEXT /* JSON string containing the starting lineup of the home team */,
  "away_team_starting_lineup" TEXT /* JSON string containing the starting lineup of the away team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)
column_names: City where the team is based
Name of the current head coach
JSON string containing links to the team's social media profiles
